fun_fact: Even the most traditional tournament in sport is adapting to a warming world. The 2025 Championships opened as the hottest on record at 34°C — hot enough to trigger Wimbledon's 'heat rule', which lets players take a 10-minute break once the heat-stress index climbs past 30.1°C. The famous grass courts now need extra watering to survive hotter, drier summers, and the roughly 2 million strawberries served each year are grown under ever more careful climate control to keep them ripening on schedule.
